title: Better Adventures++ LCE
description: A version of Better Adventures++ that uses Legacy4J to emulate the Legacy Console Edition. Perfect for the Steam Deck!
body:
(note: MultiMC/Prism Launcher are recommended. Any other launchers, support is not guaranteed, as I don't use anything other than Prism Launcher)

This version of the pack is meant for people who want to have an enhanced Legacy Console experience. It's based on 1.20.4, meaning there's not as many mods, which also means it should run better.

# Need a server? Check [Sparked Host](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2715) out! My affiliate link is another way you can help me out, plus you can use ADVENTURES++ for 15% off any of their services for the first month!

(Also, I'm not getting paid to say this nor am I required to, but their pricing is fairly reasonable!)

![$0.53/GB Minecraft server hosting. Use code ADVENTURES++ for 15% off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ffe9854de013a5250bbaa7c7b3b8d76f49e8a84.png)

Please do not ask in Flowstate's Discord server for support for Better Adventures++ or it's varients. [Join the server for Better Adventures++ if you want support for it.](https://discord.gg/NtanDV6k2F)

Better Adventures++ is a **modified** version of Flowstate's Better Adventures+ modpack, with a few extra QoL or content mods included in addition to the base mods from that modpack.

I highly, highly recommend using [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels) (or [Complimentary Renewed](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) if your computer can't handle Rethinking Voxels), the pro version of the Physics Mod (which is free now), and the Stay True, FreshAnimations. and xali's Enhanced Vanilla resource packs for the best experience.

Some mods in this pack require I link back to them, so please go support the developers of them as well:

https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kiwi-fabric

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-fabric

https://www.stardustlabs.net/

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illuminations (1.19 version)

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective (1.19 version)

Physics mod - https://www.patreon.com/Haubna

The following is the description for Better Adventures+. Please go support Flowstate in general, and if you like this pack! All credit goes to him!
---

> We all love Minecraft, but it can get a bit stale at times. This modpack contains almost 100 mods that will enhance the Vanilla experience.

> You will find dozens of quality of life mods, visual changes, added ambience, and more, which will breathe life into your worlds and builds. These mods have also been tested on a modded Fabric server, so you can play with your friends too if you decide to set that up!

> Also, please support the creators of all of these mods and added content! They make great stuff, go check them out!

> IMPORTANT:

> - This modpack is built around Fabric (0.14.14) and Minecraft 1.19.2. These are the only supported versions at this time.

> - There have been some crashing issues related to UI elements (ex: clicking on certain things like Advancement pop-ups in chat may cause a crash). Like with any modpack, crashing is to be expected, but just be aware.

 
> Check out a full breakdown of the modpack on YouTube below: 

 
> [How To Make Minecraft Feel Like A Sequel [Part 1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=phoW7znBn_E)

> [50+ Mods That Enhance Vanilla Minecraft [Part 2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QDJO9a1FaEw)
